cxu_object.claim: In volatile market regimes the optimal strategy is defensive with half position sizing tight stop losses and extreme selectivity only entering when ninety percent or more of signals agree on direction

supporting_contexts.text: Volatile regime: defensive playbook. Risk management: max size 0.5 (partial position), tighter stop losses, wider take-profit targets. Only enter when signal consensus is extremely high (>90%). Most decisions should be HOLD.
US session (14:00-20:00 UTC) produces the most volatile conditions. No single strategy wins in volatile markets. Capital preservation is the primary objective when volatility regime is detected.

positionSizeMultiplier.description: Position size multiplier (0.5 = half size for capital preservation)

consensusThresholdPct.description: Minimum signal consensus required before entry in volatile regime

stopLossPct.description: Fixed stop loss percentage (tighter than other regimes)

maxTradesPerDay.description: Maximum entries per day — strongly biased toward zero

version.change_description: Initial volatile playbook — defensive, capital preservation focus
